description_long: This is a boxy, medium-sized food truck with a smooth, light blue exterior and a utilitarian design. The vehicle features a large rectangular body with rounded edges, two side doors, and a set of black wheels with simple hubcaps. The front of the truck has a wide windshield split into two panes, flanked by side mirrors and a prominent silver grille below. The rear is equipped with a roll-up door, surrounded by vertical taillights and a sturdy black bumper. The side view reveals a sliding service window, suggesting a point of customer interaction, but there is no visible signage or menu display. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A light blue, boxy food truck with a smooth exterior, large windows, and a rear roll-up door. It features a sliding service window and a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a roll-up door, vertical taillights, and a black bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the sliding service window, side door, and two wheels.
description_view_2: Front view with a wide split windshield, silver grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid panel, side door, and two wheels.
